svg.title: INT16 YOLOv8 NPU system architecture on KR260
svg.desc: ARM PS on left with PyTorch, torch.library op, Linux driver, and Detect head. FPGA PL on right with microcoded sequencer, 16x16 INT16 systolic array, 64-lane SIMD VPU, full-width ping-pong SRAM hub, and DMA engine. All share DDR4 memory at the bottom via AXI buses.

g.text: Banks A / B · weight + activation buffers · ~38 BRAM36
DDR4 4 GB shared memory — 19.2 GB/s peak
